untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'successively higher lows' (multi-bar pattern matching), 'resistance level identification' (support/resistance detection algorithm), and 'tight progression within ATR multiple' (comparative ATR logic across multiple bars). These require pattern recognition and lookback logic beyond the allowed indicator set and single-bar condition operators. The core institutional accumulation signal cannot be fully expressed with available point-in-time indicators.
translation_notes: Partially translated using available indicators: higher low detected via low > prev_low, accumulation signature via volume < hvol_20 (below-average volume). Exit on close below lowest low approximated as close < low. Missing: multi-bar higher low series validation, resistance level detection and testing count, entry proximity to resistance, time-based hold without breakout. These require custom pattern recognition logic external to the JSON rule schema.
